name: Daniel Cregg
background: Daniel J. Cregg is Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of PSEG, PSE&G and PSEG Power. He has served in this role since October 2015. Previously, he was Vice President - Finance of PSEG Power from 2013 to 2015.

commpanies.name: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated
commpanies.title_or_role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
